welcome.title: Welcome to simsc
welcome.intro: This is your entry point to the simsc simulation environment. Your account is signed in via Cognito; the app itself uses an API key for all backend calls.
welcome.your_key_reveal_hint: This key is shown ONCE. Copy or download it now — you can also regenerate later from the app's settings.
welcome.no_key_hint: Your API key is already saved in this browser. If you need a fresh one, use the Keys tab inside the app.

app.title: simsc
app.no_key_prompt: This browser has no API key yet. Sign in from /  to auto-populate one, or paste an existing key below.

admin.title: simsc admin
admin.not_admin: You are signed in but do not have admin rights.
